title: Horoscope
profTagline: Your sign's reading for yesterday, today and tomorrow — generated on your device, offline and private, stable through the day and fresh each morning. Pick your sign once; the stars do the rest.
signDates: Mar 21 – Apr 19|Apr 20 – May 20|May 21 – Jun 20|Jun 21 – Jul 22|Jul 23 – Aug 22|Aug 23 – Sep 22|Sep 23 – Oct 22|Oct 23 – Nov 21|Nov 22 – Dec 21|Dec 22 – Jan 19|Jan 20 – Feb 18|Feb 19 – Mar 20
openings: The morning arrives with an unusual clarity.|A quiet momentum has been building beneath the surface.|Today asks less of you than it first seems.|Something you set aside returns, softened.|The pace is yours to set — and slower suits you.|An old certainty loosens its grip, and that's a relief.|You're closer to a decision than you think.
focuses: Attention on the people around you is repaid twice over.|A small risk at work opens a door you'd stopped watching.|Rest is not the reward for the day — it's part of the work.|Say the true thing kindly; it lands better than you fear.|Money follows a boundary you finally hold.|Creativity wants a limit today, not a blank page.|The body is asking for water, movement, and less screen.
advice: Trust the first, calmer answer.|Let one thing stay unfinished on purpose.|Reach out before you feel ready.|Choose the plan you can keep, not the one that impresses.|Protect the first hour of your morning.|Give the credit away; keep the lesson.|End the day lighter than you started it.
